S

sacco - package sacco
 
setBold(boolean) - Method in class sacco.PaintBrush
modifies the font to be Bold or not
setColor(int, int, int) - Method in class sacco.PaintBrush
Sets the color of the PaintBrush to the given red, green, and blue values
setColor(String) - Method in class sacco.PaintBrush
Sets the color of the PaintBrush to one of the standard presets
setColor(Color) - Method in class sacco.PaintBrush
Sets the color of the PaintBrush to the given Color object
setFont(String) - Method in class sacco.PaintBrush
Sets the Font to a given Font.
setFontSize(int) - Method in class sacco.PaintBrush
Sets the Font to a given size
setItalic(boolean) - Method in class sacco.PaintBrush
modifies the font to be Italic or not
setThickness(int) - Method in class sacco.PaintBrush
Sets the thickness of the line to the parameter
